Company: The name of the company this data is related to
Department: The specific department within the company this data is related to
Availability_Start: The start of the time period during which live representatives are available
Availability_End: The end of the time period during which live representatives are available
Days_Available: The days of the week on which live representatives are available
Automated_Response_Option: The automated response system available when live representatives are not
Response_Time: The maximum amount of time within which a representative will respond to a customer's message left on the automated system
